basics.name: Yanjing Yang
basics.summary: Direct-admission Ph.D. student in Software Engineering at Nanjing University. Research interests include source code security, API security, LLM-based vulnerability detection, and agentic AI for security analysis.

work.name: CCF Populus Grove Project
work.position: Researcher, Multi-Agent Collaboration Task Error Detection
work.summary: Anomaly detection and feedback for multi-agent collaboration systems in code generation.

work.name: CCF Populus Grove Project
work.position: Researcher, Vulnerability Detection Based on LLM in OpenHarmony
work.summary: Fine-tuned LLMs with HarmonyOS vulnerability information and optimized vulnerability detection models.

work.name: CCF Populus Grove Project
work.summary: Designed core algorithms for agentic AI based API security, including black-box API discovery and detection of malicious payloads and abnormal API call patterns.

publications.name: DLAP: A Deep Learning Augmented Large Language Model Prompting Framework for Software Vulnerability Detection
publications.summary: Yanjing Yang, X. Zhou, R. Mao, J. Xu, L. Yang, Y. Zhang, H. Shen, H. Zhang.

publications.name: Towards Robust Detection for Malicious Injection Variants
publications.summary: Yanjing Yang, B. Liu, H. Zhang, J. Xu, X. Zhou, J. Lyu, Z. Mao, D. Pan.

publications.name: MSPLD: Shilling Attack Detection Model Based on Meta Self-Paced Learning
publications.publisher: International Joint Conference on Neural Networks
